message.content:
@startuml
actor User
boundary "index.jsp" as index
boundary "basket.jsp" as basket
participant "Order" as Order
participant "Pay" as Pay
participant "LogicFacade" as LogicFacade
participant "OrderMapper" as OrderMapper
database "Database" as Database

note left of User: We assume user\nis logged in

User -> index : user clicks "add to cart"
index -> Order : [for each cupcake] AddToOrder()
index <-- Order : redirect (msg "added to basket")
User <-- index : display msg
User -> index : user clicks "show basket"
index -> basket : ShowBasket()
basket -> Pay : Pay()
Pay -> Pay : Check date
Pay -> Pay : Check if logged in
Pay -> Pay : Check balance
Pay -> LogicFacade : saveOrder()
LogicFacade -> OrderMapper : saveOrder()
OrderMapper -> Database : saves order
LogicFacade <-- OrderMapper : return
Pay <-- LogicFacade : return
basket <-- Pay : redirect (msg "order placed")
User <-- basket : display msg

@enduml
